ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the school */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "main_lvl_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main level of education offered */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the school */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school's location */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric coordinates of the school's location */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the school was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_main_lvl_id FOREIGN KEY ("main_lvl_id") REFERENCES school_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level (e.g., PRIMARY, MIXED LEVELS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., GOVERNMENT, PRIVATE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school associated with the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric coordinates of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the school is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_locations_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., ADMIN, DATA ANALYST, RESEARCHER) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the school data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the school data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., VIEW, DOWNLOAD) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school associated with the administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_administrators_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_curriculum" (
  "curriculum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curriculum */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school offering the curriculum */,
  "curriculum_name" TEXT /* Name of the curriculum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the curriculum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curriculum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_curriculum_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school offering the facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_facilities_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school associated with the enrollment record */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the enrollment data */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_enrollment_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_accreditation" (
  "accreditation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school associated with the accreditation record */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the school */,
  "accreditation_date" TEXT /* Date of the accreditation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accreditation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_accreditation_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school associated with the performance record */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the performance data */,
  "average_grade" REAL /* Average grade of the students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school associated with the staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_staff_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
